headline: Intuitive Surgical Expands Southern Europe Reach And Raises Questions For Growth
summary: Intuitive Surgical has completed the acquisition of distribution businesses covering Italy, Spain, Portugal, and other Southern European territories. The move brings these markets under direct company operations, with the goal of serving hospitals and surgeons more directly. The development marks a new phase for the company’s presence in key European markets for robotic assisted surgery.
